samples.target_compile_errors:
error[E0277]: can't compare `&i32` with `i32`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/mistral-codestral-2508/declarations/restrict_def_3/sample_003/target.rs:18:43
   |
18 |     p.iter().zip(q.iter()).all(|(a, b)| a == b + b)
   |                                           ^^ no implementation for `&i32 == i32`
   |
   = help: the trait `PartialEq<i32>` is not implemented for `&i32`
help: consider dereferencing here
   |
18 |     p.iter().zip(q.iter()).all(|(a, b)| *a == b + b)
   |                                         +

warning: variable `sink` is assigned to, but never used
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/mistral-codestral-2508/declarations/restrict_def_3/sample_003/target.rs:22:13
   |
22 |     let mut sink = 0;
   |             ^^^^
   |
   = note: consider using `_sink` instead
   = note: `#[warn(unused_variables)]` (part of `#[warn(unused)]`) on by default

error: aborting due to 1 previous error; 1 warning emitted

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0277`.
